mapper.sql: id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, path, component, icon, method, api_pattern, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.parent_id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_type, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.method, p.api_pattern, p.status, p.sort_order, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.is_deleted FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.parent_id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_type, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.method, p.api_pattern, p.status, p.sort_order, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.is_deleted FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_type = #{permissionType} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission ( parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, path, component, icon, method, api_pattern, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{method}, #{apiPattern}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
